usage: delete_cell_obs [-help] -cells <libCell/ptnCell|topCell|vCell>+ {-obs_shapes <shape>+ | [[-rects {{llx1 lly1 urx1 ury1} {llx2 lly2 urx2 ury2}...}> | -polygon { <x1 y1> <x2 y2> <x3 y3> ...}] -layers <layer>+]}

options.name: -obs_shapes
options.description: Specifies the cell obstruction shape pointers. ((shape)+, optional)

options.name: -rects
